description:
Advances: specled.spec_review.decisions_governance_inline

MODIFIED decisions in the Decisions Changed panel render only the head body_text (review.ex read_adr_body → html.ex render_changed_decision_full). Impossible to tell what changed — e.g. batch_from_day_one in atlas PR 62 gained an appended Update section but reads as a plain document.

Fix: fetch base body via SpecDiff.fetch_at_ref, render a body diff following the Spec-tab pattern from 5570bea: semantic del/ins as the primary read (block-level: added/removed/changed sections or paragraphs) plus a folded raw line diff. Likely needs a new spec requirement (decision body diff) — amend spec_review.spec.md accordingly.
title: Modified decisions show no diff — render base→head ADR body diff
